modules.module_title: Logistics aur Supply Chain ka Parichay

questions.question: Logistics ka mukhya uddeshya kya hai?

options.A: Products ko sahi samay par, sahi jagah par, sahi matra mein pahunchana.
options.B: Sirf products ko transport karna.
options.D: Company ke employees ko train karna.

questions.explanation: Logistics ka main aim products ko customers tak efficiently aur effectively deliver karna hai, sahi time, sahi place aur sahi quantity mein.

questions.question: Supply Chain Management (SCM) mein kya shamil hota hai?

options.A: Raw material se final product tak ka poora flow.
options.B: Sirf manufacturing process.

questions.explanation: SCM raw material ki sourcing se lekar final product ki customer tak delivery tak ke saare processes ko manage karta hai.

questions.question: Automobile sector mein 'Inbound Logistics' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Finished vehicles ko dealerships tak pahunchana.
options.B: Spare parts aur components ko manufacturing plant tak lana.

questions.explanation: Inbound Logistics mein suppliers se raw materials, components, aur parts ko manufacturing facility tak lana shamil hai.

questions.question: Outbound Logistics mein kaun si activity aati hai?

options.B: Finished goods ko customers ya dealerships tak deliver karna.

questions.explanation: Outbound Logistics mein final products ko manufacturers se end-users ya distributors tak pahunchana shamil hai.

questions.question: Ek efficient logistics system ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Customer satisfaction kam ho jaata hai.
options.C: Delivery times kam hote hain aur costs reduce hote hain.

questions.explanation: Efficient logistics se operations smooth hote hain, jisse delivery speed badhti hai aur expenses kam hote hain.

questions.question: Third-Party Logistics (3PL) provider kya karta hai?

options.B: Logistics services (jaise warehousing, transport) ko outsource karta hai.
options.C: Company ke marketing campaigns manage karta hai.
options.D: Company ke HR department ko handle karta hai.

questions.explanation: 3PL providers ek company ke liye logistics functions ko handle karte hain, jaise transportation, warehousing, aur distribution.

questions.question: Reverse Logistics ka kya role hai automobile spare parts supply chain mein?

options.A: Naye parts ko dealerships tak pahunchana.
options.B: Defective, unused ya returned parts ko customer se manufacturer tak wapas lana.

questions.explanation: Reverse Logistics mein products ya parts ko customer se wapas supply chain mein lana shamil hai, recycling, repair ya disposal ke liye.

questions.question: Just-In-Time (JIT) inventory system ka primary goal kya hai?

options.B: Inventory costs ko minimize karna aur waste reduce karna.

questions.explanation: JIT ka aim hai ki parts aur materials tabhi receive kiye jaayen jab unki zaroorat ho, jisse inventory holding costs aur waste kam ho.

questions.question: Supply Chain mein 'bottleneck' kya hota hai?

options.A: Ek point jahan flow slow ho jaata hai ya ruk jaata hai.
options.B: Ek naya product launch.
options.D: Supply chain mein sabse tez point.

questions.explanation: Bottleneck supply chain mein ek aisa stage ya process hai jahan capacity limited hoti hai, jisse poore system ka flow slow ho jaata hai.

questions.question: Logistics Coordinator ka ek mukhya kaam kya hai?

options.B: Shipments ko track aur schedule karna.
options.C: Company ke financial records maintain karna.

questions.explanation: Logistics Coordinator shipments ki movement ko plan, track aur coordinate karta hai, ensuring timely delivery.

questions.question: Cross-docking ka kya fayda hai warehousing mein?

options.B: Inventory handling aur storage time ko kam karna.

questions.explanation: Cross-docking mein incoming shipments ko directly outgoing shipments mein transfer kiya jaata hai, bina lambe samay tak store kiye, jisse handling costs aur time kam hote hain.

questions.question: Automobile OEM (Original Equipment Manufacturer) ki supply chain mein kaun shamil hota hai?

options.B: Sirf dealerships.

questions.explanation: OEM ki supply chain mein parts suppliers jo components provide karte hain, assembly plants jahan vehicles assemble hote hain, aur dealerships jo vehicles sell karte hain, sab shamil hote hain.

questions.question: Freight forwarding company ka primary role kya hai?

options.B: Shippers aur carriers ke beech coordination aur documentation handle karna.

questions.explanation: Freight forwarders international aur domestic shipments ke liye logistics services provide karte hain, jisme documentation, customs clearance aur carrier selection shamil hai.

questions.question: Last-mile delivery ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Manufacturing plant se warehouse tak ki delivery.
options.B: Warehouse se final customer ke doorstep tak ki delivery.

questions.explanation: Last-mile delivery supply chain ka final stage hai, jahan product distribution hub se end customer tak pahunchta hai.

questions.question: Logistics mein 'Lead Time' kya hota hai?

options.B: Order place karne se delivery receive hone tak ka samay.
options.D: Warehouse mein inventory check ka time.

questions.explanation: Lead time woh total duration hai jo ek order ko process aur deliver hone mein lagti hai.

questions.question: Supply chain visibility ka kya importance hai?

options.B: Poore supply chain mein products ki location aur status ko track karna.

questions.explanation: Supply chain visibility se companies ko apne products aur assets ki real-time location aur status pata chalta hai, jisse better decision-making aur problem-solving hoti hai.

questions.question: Ek efficient supply chain kya achieve karti hai?

options.B: Improved customer service and reduced operational expenses.

questions.explanation: Ek efficient supply chain customer service ko behtar banati hai aur operational costs ko kam karti hai.

questions.question: Fleet Management ka primary goal kya hai?

options.B: Vehicles ki efficiency, safety aur cost-effectiveness ko manage karna.

questions.explanation: Fleet Management mein vehicles ke poore lifecycle ko manage karna shamil hai, unki purchase se lekar maintenance aur disposal tak, taki operations efficient aur cost-effective rahen.

questions.question: Preventive Maintenance (PM) ka kya fayda hai fleet ke liye?

options.A: Vehicles ko zyada breakdown hone dena.
options.B: Unexpected repairs ko minimize karna aur vehicle life badhana.

questions.explanation: PM regular checks aur servicing se vehicles ko achhi condition mein rakhta hai, jisse breakdowns kam hote hain aur vehicle ki lifespan badhti hai.

questions.question: Fleet Coordinator ka ek important kaam kya hai?

options.A: Company ke shareholders ko manage karna.
options.B: Vehicle maintenance schedules aur repairs ko coordinate karna.

questions.explanation: Fleet Coordinator vehicles ki availability aur reliability ensure karne ke liye maintenance aur repairs ko manage karta hai.

questions.question: Commercial vehicles mein GPS tracking ka kya role hai?

options.B: Vehicle location track karna, routes optimize karna aur driver behaviour monitor karna.

questions.explanation: GPS tracking se fleet managers vehicles ki real-time location dekh sakte hain, routes plan kar sakte hain aur driver performance ko analyze kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Fuel efficiency ko improve karne ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Regular vehicle maintenance aur proper tyre pressure maintain karna.

questions.explanation: Regular maintenance aur sahi tyre pressure fuel consumption ko kam karne mein madad karta hai.

questions.question: Vehicle logbook maintain karna kyun important hai?

options.B: Maintenance history, fuel consumption aur mileage ko record karne ke liye.
options.C: Drivers ki personal details store karne ke liye.
options.D: Company ke profits ko calculate karne ke liye.

questions.explanation: Logbook se vehicle ki complete history track hoti hai, jo maintenance scheduling, cost analysis aur regulatory compliance ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Fleet mein vehicle downtime ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Vehicle ka operational na hona due to maintenance ya repair.

questions.explanation: Downtime woh samay hai jab vehicle kaam nahi kar raha hota, usually maintenance, repair ya kisi aur reason se.

questions.question: Driver safety training ka kya importance hai?

options.B: Accidents ko reduce karna aur safe driving practices ko promote karna.
options.C: Drivers ko jaldi drive karne ke liye encourage karna.

questions.explanation: Safety training se drivers ki skills improve hoti hain, jisse accidents aur injuries kam hote hain.

questions.question: Fleet utilization ko kaise improve kiya ja sakta hai?

options.B: Efficient route planning aur vehicle scheduling se.

questions.explanation: Efficient route planning aur scheduling se vehicles ka maximum use hota hai, jisse idle time kam hota hai aur productivity badhti hai.

questions.question: Vehicle inspection checklist mein kya shamil hona chahiye?

options.B: Tyre condition, lights, brakes, fluid levels, wipers.

questions.explanation: Vehicle inspection checklist mein sabhi critical components ki check shamil honi chahiye jo vehicle ki safety aur functionality ke liye zaroori hain.

questions.question: Telematics system fleet management mein kya provide karta hai?

options.B: Real-time data jaise location, speed, fuel level, engine diagnostics.

questions.explanation: Telematics data fleet managers ko vehicle performance, driver behaviour aur operational efficiency ke baare mein valuable insights deta hai.

questions.question: What is the primary function of a vehicle's 'Tachograph' in commercial transport?

options.A: To play music for the driver.
options.B: To record driving time, rest periods, and speed.

questions.explanation: Tachograph driver ke driving hours, rest periods, aur vehicle ki speed ko record karta hai, jo regulations aur safety compliance ke liye important hai.

questions.question: Fleet mein vehicle 'lifecycle cost' mein kya shamil hai?

options.B: Purchase, fuel, maintenance, insurance, aur disposal costs.

questions.explanation: Lifecycle cost vehicle ke poore lifespan mein hone wale sabhi expenses ko include karti hai, purchase se lekar disposal tak.

questions.question: Vehicle 'payload capacity' kya define karti hai?

options.B: Maximum weight jo vehicle safely carry kar sakta hai.
options.D: Number of passengers jo vehicle mein baith sakte hain.

questions.explanation: Payload capacity woh maximum weight hai jo vehicle apne passengers aur cargo ke roop mein safely transport kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Fleet management mein 'asset tracking' ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Sirf vehicle ki cleaning schedule manage karna.
options.B: Vehicles aur equipment ki real-time location aur status ko monitor karna.

questions.explanation: Asset tracking se fleet managers ko vehicles aur anya valuable equipment ki exact location aur status pata chalti hai, jisse theft prevention aur better utilization hoti hai.

questions.question: Tyre pressure ko regular check karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf tyre ki appearance ke liye.
options.B: Fuel efficiency, safety aur tyre lifespan ke liye.
options.C: Vehicle ki speed badhane ke liye.
options.D: Brakes ko zyada ghisane ke liye.

questions.explanation: Sahi tyre pressure fuel efficiency ko maintain karta hai, road safety badhata hai aur tyres ki lifespan ko extend karta hai.

questions.question: Fleet management software (FMS) ka kya upyog hai?

options.B: Vehicle data, maintenance, fuel aur driver records ko centralize aur manage karna.
options.D: Personal photos store karne ke liye.

questions.explanation: FMS fleet operations ko streamline karta hai, data analysis provide karta hai aur overall efficiency ko improve karta hai.

questions.question: Inventory Management ka kya uddeshya hai?

options.B: Stock levels ko optimize karna, demand poori karna aur holding costs kam karna.

questions.explanation: Inventory management ka aim hai ki right amount of stock available ho, taaki customer demand bhi poori ho aur excessive holding costs bhi na lagain.

questions.question: Automobile spare parts ke liye 'Warehouse' ka kya role hai?

options.B: Parts ko receive karna, store karna aur dispatch karna.

questions.explanation: Warehouse parts ki systematic storage, handling aur movement ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: 'Stockout' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Warehouse mein bahut zyada stock hona.
options.B: Kisi item ka inventory mein available na hona jab uski demand ho.

questions.explanation: Stockout tab hota hai jab customer demand ko poora karne ke liye koi item stock mein na ho, jisse sales loss aur customer dissatisfaction hoti hai.

questions.question: FIFO (First-In, First-Out) method ka kya fayda hai automobile parts mein?

options.A: Naye parts ko pehle use karna.
options.B: Purane parts ko pehle use karna, taaki obsolescence aur damage kam ho.
options.D: Sirf high-value parts ko pehle use karna.

questions.explanation: FIFO ensures karta hai ki jo parts pehle aaye hain, woh pehle use hon, jisse expiry, damage ya obsolescence ka risk kam hota hai.

questions.question: 'Safety Stock' kyun maintain kiya jaata hai?

options.A: Sirf zyada space consume karne ke liye.
options.B: Unexpected demand spikes ya supply delays ko cope karne ke liye.
options.D: Parts ko damage karne ke liye.

questions.explanation: Safety stock ek buffer inventory hai jo unexpected situations mein stockouts se bachne ke liye maintain kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Warehouse layout design karte samay kya consider karna chahiye?

options.B: Efficient material flow, storage capacity aur accessibility.

questions.explanation: Ek achha warehouse layout efficient operations, maximum storage utilization aur easy access provide karta hai.

questions.question: ABC Analysis inventory management mein kya help karta hai?

options.A: Sabhi items ko equally treat karna.
options.B: Items ko unki value aur importance ke hisaab se categorize karna.
options.C: Sirf low-value items par focus karna.

questions.explanation: ABC analysis inventory items ko A (high-value), B (medium-value), C (low-value) categories mein divide karta hai, jisse inventory control efforts ko prioritize kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Cycle Counting ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Saal mein ek baar poora inventory count karna.
options.B: Regularly chhote portions of inventory ko count karna, taaki accuracy maintain rahe.
options.C: Sirf naye parts ko count karna.
options.D: Inventory ko bilkul count na karna.

questions.explanation: Cycle counting se inventory records ki accuracy maintain hoti hai aur full physical inventory count ki zaroorat kam padti hai.

questions.question: Warehouse Management System (WMS) ka kya upyog hai?

options.B: Inventory tracking, order fulfillment, receiving aur putaway processes ko automate aur optimize karna.

questions.explanation: WMS warehouse operations ko streamline karta hai, accuracy badhata hai aur operational costs ko kam karta hai.

questions.question: Material Handling Equipment (MHE) ka kya role hai warehouse mein?

options.B: Goods ko efficiently move, store aur retrieve karna.

questions.explanation: MHE (jaise forklifts, pallet jacks) goods ki movement aur storage ko safer aur faster banata hai.

questions.question: Barcoding system inventory management mein kaise help karta hai?

options.B: Quick aur accurate inventory identification aur tracking.

questions.explanation: Barcodes se items ko quickly scan aur identify kiya ja sakta hai, jisse data entry errors kam hote hain aur tracking efficient hoti hai.

questions.question: What is 'Shrinkage' in inventory management?

options.A: Inventory ka size mein chhota hona.
options.B: Inventory loss due to theft, damage, or administrative errors.

questions.explanation: Shrinkage refers to the reduction in inventory quantity due to reasons other than sales, jaise ki chori, damage, ya record errors.

questions.question: Inventory turnover ratio kya indicate karta hai?

options.B: Kitni jaldi inventory sold aur replaced ho rahi hai.

questions.explanation: High inventory turnover ratio indicate karta hai ki inventory efficiently manage ho rahi hai aur capital tied up nahi hai.

questions.question: Ek efficient warehouse mein 'picking' process ka kya aim hai?

options.B: Orders ko accurately aur quickly fulfill karna.
options.C: Sirf bade items ko pick karna.

questions.explanation: Efficient picking se customer orders timely aur correctly deliver hote hain, jisse customer satisfaction badhti hai.

questions.question: Automobile parts ko store karte samay temperature aur humidity control kyun important hai?

options.A: Sirf workers ke comfort ke liye.
options.B: Parts ko rust, corrosion aur degradation se bachane ke liye.
options.C: Parts ko zyada chamakdar banane ke liye.
options.D: Warehouse ko thanda rakhne ke liye.

questions.explanation: Proper environmental control delicate electronic parts, rubber components aur metal parts ko damage hone se bachata hai.

questions.question: What is 'Dock Scheduling' in a warehouse?

options.A: Drivers ke liye rest area schedule karna.
options.B: Incoming aur outgoing trucks ke liye loading/unloading docks ko manage aur schedule karna.

questions.explanation: Dock scheduling se trucks ka flow optimize hota hai, waiting times kam hote hain aur warehouse efficiency badhti hai.

questions.question: Road transportation ka mukhya fayda kya hai for short to medium distances?

options.B: Flexibility aur door-to-door delivery.

questions.explanation: Road transport flexibility provide karta hai aur directly source se destination tak delivery kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Route optimization ka kya uddeshya hai?

options.B: Shortest, most efficient route find karna to save fuel aur time.

questions.explanation: Route optimization se operational costs kam hote hain, delivery times improve hote hain aur customer satisfaction badhti hai.

questions.question: Bill of Lading (BOL) kya hai?

options.B: Carrier aur shipper ke beech ek legal document jo goods ki details aur transport terms specify karta hai.

questions.explanation: BOL ek critical legal document hai jo goods ki ownership, destination aur quantity ko confirm karta hai.

questions.question: Intermodal transportation ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Sirf ek mode of transport use karna.
options.B: Goods ko ek hi container mein multiple modes of transport (jaise road, rail, sea) se move karna.

questions.explanation: Intermodal transport efficiency badhata hai aur cost-effectiveness provide karta hai by combining the strengths of different transport modes.

questions.question: POD (Proof of Delivery) ka kya importance hai?

options.B: Goods ki successful delivery ko confirm karna aur disputes avoid karna.

questions.explanation: POD ek signed document hai jo confirm karta hai ki goods receive ho gaye hain, jo billing aur accountability ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: What is 'Consolidation' in transportation?

options.A: Har order ko alag se ship karna.
options.B: Multiple small shipments ko ek bade shipment mein combine karna.

questions.explanation: Consolidation se transportation costs kam hote hain aur efficiency badhti hai, especially for Less-than-Truckload (LTL) shipments.

questions.question: Perishable goods (jaise kuch auto chemicals) ke liye kaun sa mode of transport sabse suitable hai?

options.B: Refrigerated or temperature-controlled transport.

questions.explanation: Temperature-controlled transport perishable goods ki quality aur integrity maintain karta hai.

questions.question: Freight cost calculate karte samay kya factors consider kiye jaate hain?

options.B: Weight, volume, distance, mode of transport aur urgency.

questions.explanation: Ye sab factors freight charges ko determine karte hain aur overall transportation cost ko affect karte hain.

questions.question: What is 'Deadheading' in logistics?

options.A: Truck ka full load ke saath chalna.
options.B: Truck ka return trip par khaali chalna.
options.C: Truck ka maintenance ke liye jana.

questions.explanation: Deadheading inefficient hota hai kyunki isse fuel waste hota hai aur revenue generate nahi hota. Isse minimize karne ki koshish ki jaati hai.

questions.question: Customs clearance process ki zaroorat kab padti hai?

options.B: International borders across goods move karte samay.

questions.explanation: Customs clearance international trade mein ek mandatory process hai to ensure goods legal hain aur duties pay kiye gaye hain.

questions.question: GPS navigation system ka route planning mein kya fayda hai?

options.B: Real-time traffic updates, shortest routes aur ETA provide karna.

questions.explanation: GPS navigation se drivers ko efficient routes milte hain, jisse time aur fuel save hota hai.

questions.question: What is 'Last-Mile Optimization'?

options.A: Warehouse se manufacturing plant tak ka route optimize karna.
options.B: Final delivery stage ko efficient banana, jisme costs kam karna aur speed badhana shamil hai.
options.D: Raw material procurement routes optimize karna.

questions.explanation: Last-mile optimization delivery ki sabse challenging aur costly stage ko improve karta hai, especially urban areas mein.

questions.question: Hazardous materials (HAZMAT) ko transport karte samay kya precautions leni chahiye?

options.A: Unko normal goods ke saath mix karna.
options.B: Special packaging, labeling aur certified carriers ka use karna.
options.D: Unko open container mein transport karna.

questions.explanation: HAZMAT transport ke liye strict regulations hote hain safety aur environmental protection ke liye.

questions.question: A 'Hub-and-Spoke' distribution model ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Har destination ke liye direct route.
options.B: Central hub se multiple destinations tak efficient routing aur consolidation.

questions.explanation: Hub-and-spoke model se network efficiency badhti hai, costs kam hote hain aur scalability milti hai, especially for large distribution networks.

questions.question: Transporter selection mein kya factors important hote hain?

options.B: Reliability, cost, transit time, safety record aur insurance.
options.C: Transporter ke drivers ki personal details.

questions.explanation: Sahi transporter choose karna supply chain ki efficiency aur reliability ke liye crucial hai.

questions.question: Ek 'Delivery Challan' ka kya uddeshya hai?

options.B: Goods ki details specify karna jo deliver kiye ja rahe hain, without commercial value.

questions.explanation: Delivery Challan goods ki movement ko track karta hai aur receiving party ko goods ki details provide karta hai, especially jab immediate sale na ho.

questions.question: What is 'Backhauling' in transportation?

options.A: Only transporting goods in one direction.
options.B: Picking up a load for the return trip to avoid empty travel.
options.D: Using a smaller vehicle for transport.

questions.explanation: Backhauling se fuel efficiency badhti hai, costs kam hote hain aur environmental impact reduce hota hai by minimizing empty runs.

questions.question: Road safety regulations ka palan karna kyun important hai?

options.A: Sirf fine se bachne ke liye.
options.B: Accidents ko prevent karna aur drivers, goods, aur public ki safety ensure karna.

questions.explanation: Road safety regulations ka palan karna sabhi road users ki suraksha ke liye aur legal compliance ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Vehicle insurance ka kya role hai fleet operations mein?

options.B: Accidents, theft, aur damage se hone wale financial losses se protect karna.
options.D: Vehicle ki speed badhane ke liye.

questions.explanation: Insurance fleet assets aur business ko unforeseen events se hone wale financial risks se cover karta hai.

questions.question: Driver fatigue ko manage karne ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Drivers ko bina rest ke drive karne dena.
options.B: Driving hours regulate karna aur regular breaks ensure karna.

questions.explanation: Fatigue driving accidents ka ek major cause hai, isliye proper rest aur driving hour limits zaroori hain.

questions.question: Vehicle emission norms ka palan kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf vehicles ko zyada costly banane ke liye.
options.B: Air pollution control karna aur environmental impact kam karna.

questions.explanation: Emission norms environment aur public health ko protect karne ke liye banaye gaye hain.

questions.question: What is 'Geofencing' in fleet management technology?

options.B: Virtual boundary create karna aur jab vehicle us area mein enter ya exit karta hai to alerts receive karna.
options.C: Sirf vehicle ki speed limit set karna.
options.D: Vehicle ko remote se start karna.

questions.explanation: Geofencing se vehicle movement monitor hoti hai, unauthorized usage prevent hota hai aur operational efficiency badhti hai.

questions.question: Fleet mein data security kyun important hai?

options.B: Confidential information (jaise customer data, route plans) ko unauthorized access se protect karna.

questions.explanation: Data security business reputation, legal compliance aur competitive advantage ke liye crucial hai.

questions.question: Vehicle fitness certificate ka kya importance hai?

options.B: Confirm karna ki vehicle roadworthy hai aur safety standards meet karta hai.

questions.explanation: Fitness certificate ensure karta hai ki vehicle operate karne ke liye safe hai aur regulations ka palan karta hai.

questions.question: E-way Bill ki zaroorat kab padti hai?

options.B: Goods ko ek state se dusre state mein ya state ke andar certain value se zyada transport karte samay.

questions.explanation: E-way Bill GST regime ke under goods ki movement ko track karne ke liye zaroori hai, taaki tax evasion na ho.

questions.question: Advanced Driver-Assistance Systems (ADAS) ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Safety features jaise collision warning, lane departure assist provide karna.

questions.explanation: ADAS accidents ko prevent karne aur driver safety ko enhance karne mein madad karta hai.

questions.question: RFID technology inventory management mein kaise upyogi hai?

options.B: Items ko wirelessly track aur identify karna, bina direct line-of-sight ke.

questions.explanation: RFID se inventory accuracy badhti hai, counting time kam hota hai aur real-time visibility milti hai.

questions.question: What is 'Predictive Maintenance' in fleet management?

options.A: Sirf vehicle breakdown hone ke baad repair karna.
options.B: Data analysis aur sensors ka use karke potential equipment failures ko predict karna.

questions.explanation: Predictive maintenance se unplanned downtime kam hota hai, maintenance costs optimize hote hain aur vehicle reliability badhti hai.

questions.question: Environmental compliance (jaise disposing of used oil) kyun important hai?

options.A: Sirf extra cost lagane ke liye.
options.B: Pollution prevent karna aur legal penalties se bachna.

questions.explanation: Environmental regulations ka palan karna business ethics, legal obligations aur sustainability ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Driver logbooks ya Electronic Logging Devices (ELDs) ka kya purpose hai?

options.A: Sirf driver ki personal notes record karna.
options.B: Driving hours, duty status aur rest periods ko accurately record karna.

questions.explanation: ELDs aur logbooks hours of service (HOS) regulations ka palan ensure karte hain, jisse driver fatigue aur accidents kam hote hain.

questions.question: What is 'Blockchain's potential' in supply chain logistics?

options.B: Supply chain transactions ki transparency, traceability aur security badhana.
options.D: Manual data entry ko promote karna.

questions.explanation: Blockchain distributed ledger technology use karke supply chain data ko secure aur tamper-proof banata hai, jisse trust aur efficiency badhti hai.

questions.question: Fleet safety policy mein kya shamil hona chahiye?

options.B: Driver training, vehicle maintenance standards, accident reporting procedures.

questions.explanation: Ek comprehensive safety policy accidents ko minimize karti hai aur safe working environment banati hai.

questions.question: Goods-in-transit insurance kyun important hai?

options.A: Sirf driver ki personal belongings cover karna.
options.B: Goods ko transport ke dauran damage, theft ya loss se protect karna.

questions.explanation: Goods-in-transit insurance businesses ko financial losses se bachata hai jo goods ke transport ke dauran ho sakte hain.

questions.question: Vehicle inspection software ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Digital inspection forms, real-time reporting aur maintenance scheduling provide karna.

questions.explanation: Inspection software inspection process ko streamline karta hai, accuracy badhata hai aur compliance ensure karta hai.

questions.question: Customer service logistics mein kyun important hai?

options.B: Customer satisfaction, brand loyalty aur business growth ke liye.

questions.explanation: Excellent customer service se repeat business milta hai aur positive word-of-mouth marketing hoti hai.

questions.question: Effective communication fleet coordinator ke liye kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Drivers, customers, suppliers aur internal teams ke beech smooth coordination ke liye.
options.C: Information ko hide karne ke liye.

questions.explanation: Clear aur timely communication se operations smooth hote hain aur errors kam hote hain.

questions.question: Customer complaint ko kaise handle karna chahiye?

options.B: Dhyan se sunna, empathy dikhana, solution offer karna aur follow up karna.
options.D: Complaint ko dusre department par daal dena.

questions.explanation: Effective complaint handling customer retention aur brand image ko improve karta hai.

questions.question: Logistics mein 'Proactive Communication' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Sirf tab communicate karna jab problem ho.
options.B: Customers ko potential delays ya issues ke baare mein pehle se inform karna.
options.C: Sirf internal team se baat karna.
options.D: Customer ko zyada information na dena.

questions.explanation: Proactive communication customer trust badhata hai aur negative impact ko kam karta hai.

questions.question: Ek fleet coordinator ko drivers ke saath kaise communicate karna chahiye?

options.B: Clear instructions, constructive feedback aur support provide karna.

questions.explanation: Positive communication drivers ke morale aur performance ko boost karta hai.

questions.question: Customer feedback collect karna kyun important hai?

options.A: Sirf time waste karne ke liye.
options.B: Services ko improve karna, operational gaps identify karna aur customer needs samajhna.

questions.explanation: Feedback se business ko valuable insights milte hain jisse services aur customer experience ko enhance kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Conflict resolution skills fleet coordinator ke liye kyun important hain?

options.B: Disputes ko constructively handle karna aur working relationships maintain karna.

questions.explanation: Conflict resolution se team harmony maintain hoti hai aur operational disruptions kam hote hain.

questions.question: Email communication karte samay kya best practice hai?

options.B: Clear subject line, concise message aur professional tone use karna.

questions.explanation: Professional emails effective communication aur clarity ensure karte hain.

questions.question: What is 'Escalation Matrix' in customer service?

options.B: Ek structured path jisme unresolved issues ko higher authority tak le jaaya jaata hai.

questions.explanation: Escalation matrix ensure karti hai ki complex ya critical issues timely aur appropriately address kiye jaayen.

questions.question: Phone par customer se baat karte samay kya important hai?

options.A: Sirf jaldi se call cut karna.
options.B: Active listening, clear speech aur polite tone maintain karna.

questions.explanation: Good phone etiquette professional image banati hai aur effective communication ensure karti hai.

questions.question: Documentation (jaise delivery receipts) maintain karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf paper waste karne ke liye.
options.B: Records maintain karna, legal compliance aur accountability ke liye.

questions.explanation: Proper documentation disputes ko solve karne aur operations ko audit karne mein madad karta hai.

questions.question: Teamwork ka kya importance hai logistics operations mein?

options.B: Goals achieve karna, problem-solving aur efficiency badhana.

questions.explanation: Teamwork se coordination badhta hai aur complex tasks ko effectively handle kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: What is 'Service Level Agreement (SLA)' in logistics?

options.A: Customer aur supplier ke beech informal agreement.
options.B: Ek contract jo service standards, delivery times aur performance metrics define karta hai.

questions.explanation: SLA clear expectations set karta hai aur accountability provide karta hai, jisse customer satisfaction maintain rehti hai.

questions.question: Customer service mein 'Empathy' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Customer ke feelings aur perspective ko samajhna aur appreciate karna.

questions.explanation: Empathy se customers ko valued feel hota hai aur stronger relationships bante hain.

questions.question: Crisis communication plan mein kya shamil hona chahiye?

options.B: Designated spokespersons, pre-approved messages aur communication channels for emergencies.

questions.explanation: Crisis communication plan unexpected events ke dauran effective response aur minimal damage ensure karta hai.

questions.question: Logistics mein 'Feedback Loop' ka kya importance hai?

options.B: Continuous improvement ke liye data aur insights ko collect aur analyze karna.

questions.explanation: Feedback loop se processes ko optimize kiya ja sakta hai aur customer experience ko consistently enhance kiya ja sakta hai.
